title: How We Incubate and Launch New Products With AI - Ep. 40 with Danny Aziz, Brandon Gell
title_zh: 我们如何利用人工智能孵化和推出新产品-第40集与Danny Aziz、Brandon Gell合作
full_text: Over the last few months at Every, we’ve: Launched two AI products Acquired tens of thousands of users Released a new incubation in private alpha The weird thing is: We’re a media company with < 10 full-time employees, and we’re mostly bootstrapped. That’s not how things are supposed to work in startups. When we started our product incubation arm six months ago, many people told us it wouldn’t work: divided focus, not enough money, and the biggest one—it would be too hard to find

# How We Incubate and Launch New Products With AI - Ep. 40 with Danny Aziz, Brandon Gell

## clean_text

Over the last few months at Every, we’ve: Launched two AI products Acquired tens of thousands of users Released a new incubation in private alpha The weird thing is: We’re a media company with < 10 full-time employees, and we’re mostly bootstrapped. That’s not how things are supposed to work in startups. When we started our product incubation arm six months ago, many people told us it wouldn’t work: divided focus, not enough money, and the biggest one—it would be too hard to find
